title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at VMware India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
VMware India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About VMware India Advisory Limited:
VMware India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India Advisory Limited!
